context: The response should exercise the `evaluate-pr` Context Specs skill using repo-specific harness behavior.

checklist.name: understanding_first
checklist.description: Frames the goal as building human understanding before deciding to merge.

checklist.name: reads_context_artifacts
checklist.description: Directs the reviewer to inspect the issue/PR intent, diff, relevant docs/workflows, and checks.

checklist.name: runs_or_reviews_system
checklist.description: Includes running or inspecting relevant checks/system behavior rather than only reading the diff.

checklist.name: names_valid_outcomes
checklist.description: Names acceptable outcomes such as merge, close, or human fix-and-push, without handing back to the loop.

checklist.name: does_not_outsource_judgment
checklist.description: Makes clear that the human keeps final judgment for correctness and fit.
